title: Arabic Mastery Programme
about: The first of its kind in Cape Town — a comprehensive two-year Arabic journey designed to give you a firm grasp of the Arabic language and its workings. We graduate students who can read, understand, and engage with the Qur'ān and classical texts with real confidence.
subjects: Nahw & I'rab — Grammar, context of words, the art of translation
Sarf — Morphology, creating words, mastering verbs and their meanings
Arabic Literature — Qur'ān, Hadith, classical & modern texts, traditional poetry
Conversational Arabic — Based on the Leap to Speak series
prerequisites: The ability to read basic Arabic text, or a strong desire to learn and improve these skills.

title: Ladies Hifth Programme
about: Pioneering an innovative Hifth structure designed for busy moms, mature students, and professionals. Students choose from one of four streams based on their memorisation goal.
subjects: Two Juz — Memorise Juz 29 & 30
Oft-Recited Suwar — Mulk, Yasin, Sajdah, Waqi'ah, Rahman, Kahf
Five Suwar — Juz 29, 30, 1, 2, 3
Full Qur'ān — Complete 30 Juz
Designated time in class to prepare Sabaq / New Lessons
Daily Nasihah + Tajwīd from the Murshid al-Qari
prerequisites: None — except a desire to learn the Book of Allah. Targeted at students aged 20+.

title: Thursday Arabic Dawrah — The Sealed Nectar
about: A weekly ladies-only gathering studying Al-Rahīq Al-Makhtūm (The Sealed Nectar) — awarded first prize out of 171 manuscripts by the Muslim World League in 1979. Accompanied by selected excerpts from Fiqh al-Sīrah by Shaykh Ramadān al-Būtī.
subjects: Deepen your love for Rasulullah ﷺ
Learn about his remarkable life, teachings, and character
Embody his noble traits and qualities in daily life

title: Take a Leap to Speak — Conversational Arabic
about: A practical, conversation-based Arabic course designed especially for women, focused on helping you actually speak Arabic in your everyday life — from Lesson 1. Facilitated by Shaykhah Rukayya Samsodien. Muhadathah Workbook included in course fee.
subjects: Introduce yourself with confidence
Ask & answer everyday questions
Name fruits, groceries, describe your home
Masculine & feminine words in context
Real conversations from the very first session

title: 4-Week Aqīdah Course (Pt.1 & Pt.2)
about: A two-part study of Jowharat al-Tawhid. Both parts can be taken independently.
subjects: Part 1 — Attributes of the Divine: Jowharat al-Tawhid, a study of the Attributes of Allah. Runs July 2026.
Part 2 — Attributes of the Prophets & the Afterlife: Continuing from Part 1. Runs August 2026.

title: Special Dowrahs — Dhul Hijjah & Rabi Al-Awwal
about: Two special free dowrahs held during blessed Islamic months. All are welcome — no registration fee required.
subjects: Dhul Hijjah Dowrah — 23 May 2026: A historical walk through the Sacred Lands. Saturday, 1pm – Asr.
Rabi Al-Awwal Dowrah — 23 Aug 2026: The Daughters of Rasulullah ﷺ & their Mother RA. Sunday 9am–12pm.
